import { ErrorInfo } from 'react'; import { NotFoundError } from '@tanstack/router-core'; import * as React from 'react'; export declare function CatchNotFound(props: { fallback?: (error: NotFoundError) => React.ReactElement; onCatch?: (error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) => void; children: React.ReactNode; }): import("react/jsx-runtime").JSX.Element; export declare function DefaultGlobalNotFound(): import("react/jsx-runtime").JSX.Element;
